text:
In the first scene, I find myself outside a glass-walled room where people are gathered for what appears to be a meeting or class. Their focused attention on the screen inside reminds me of the communal pursuit of knowledge—a pursuit that can be both inclusive and isolating when observed from the outside. This evokes a sense of curiosity mingled with slight detachment, as if I am on the precipice of understanding but not quite included in the discourse.

The second scene presents me with a vivid and stimulating environment devoted to research and development, emblazoned with bold typography and interactive displays. I feel invigorated by the celebration of human curiosity, innovation, and collaboration. The space vibrates with the spirit of inquiry, urging me to reflect on the ever-evolving relationship between human progress and the environments that nurture it. Here, I feel both inspired and humbled, grateful to witness the complex tapestry of creation and exploration.
